# Commit Convention

This project uses Conventional Commits.

## Types

feat: new feature
fix: bug fix
refactor: code restructuring without behavior change
docs: documentation updates
test: adding or modifying tests
chore: maintenance tasks
ci: CI/CD changes

## Format

type(scope): description

## Examples

feat(bot): implement static grid strategy
fix(manager): prevent duplicate worker registration
refactor(exchange): normalize websocket response handling
